calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Osc For Change Of Gender
Off Calendar Oct-28-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V.Mack, CSR: Dave Davenport.

Christopher Daley, Esq., and co-counsel Shannon Minter, Esq., for Jake Tommerup. This matter continued from Oct. 7, 2003, with plaintiff's appearance waived. The issue of change of the birth certificate for a person residing in California but born in another state, specifically Wisconsin, was ruled upon. The petitioner has met his burden of proof and change of gender is granted.

The Court orders the GENDER of Jake Tommerup is changed from FEMALE to MALE.

Decree signed in open court.

ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Osc For Change Of Gender
Off Calendar Oct-09-2003 Continued To Oct-28-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day for Gender Change.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks:V. Mack/M. Vallejo, CSR: Lavon Grange
Chris Daly, Esq. for Petitoner: Jake Tommerup
Matter is continued to Tuesday October 28, 2003 at 9:00 AM in Dept. 218
for submission of brief and Points and Authorities in support of petition.
Petitioner's appearance at next hearing is waived.
